ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Chemical symbol of the element */,
  "mendeleev_number" INTEGER /* Mendeleev number of the element */,
  "atomic_weight" REAL /* Atomic weight of the element */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the element */,
  "covalent_radius" REAL /* Covalent radius of the element */,
  "electronegativity" REAL /* Electronegativity of the element */,
  "electron_affinity" REAL /* Electron affinity of the element */,
  "ionization_energy" REAL /* Ionization energy of the element */,
  "block" TEXT /* Block of the element in the periodic table */,
  "group" INTEGER /* Group of the element in the periodic table */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the element in the periodic table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periodic_table_positions" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "column" INTEGER /* Column position in the periodic table */,
  "row" INTEGER /* Row position in the periodic table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valence_electrons" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "ns_valence" INTEGER /* Number of s-valence electrons */,
  "np_valence" INTEGER /* Number of p-valence electrons */,
  "nd_valence" INTEGER /* Number of d-valence electrons */,
  "nf_valence" INTEGER /* Number of f-valence electrons */,
  "n_valence" INTEGER /* Total number of valence electrons */,
  "ns_unfilled" INTEGER /* Number of unfilled s-electrons */,
  "np_unfilled" INTEGER /* Number of unfilled p-electrons */,
  "nd_unfilled" INTEGER /* Number of unfilled d-electrons */,
  "nf_unfilled" INTEGER /* Number of unfilled f-electrons */,
  "n_unfilled" INTEGER /* Total number of unfilled valence electrons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electronic_structure" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "gs_volume_pa" REAL /* Ground state volume per atom */,
  "gs_bandgap" REAL /* Band gap energy */,
  "gs_magmom" REAL /* Magnetic moment */,
  "space_group_number" INTEGER /* Space group number */,
  "crystal_structure" TEXT /* Crystal structure of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "magnetic_moments" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "magnetic_moment" REAL /* Magnetic moment of the element */,
  "magnetic_moment_units" TEXT /* Units of the magnetic moment (e.g., Bohr magnetons) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crystallographic_data" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "lattice_parameters" TEXT /* Lattice parameters (a, b, c, alpha, beta, gamma) */,
  "space_group_number" INTEGER /* Space group number */,
  "crystal_system" TEXT /* Crystal system (e.g., cubic, tetragonal, orthorhombic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_data" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., melting point, boiling point) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "property_units" TEXT /* Units of the property */,
  "experiment_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the property */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the experimental data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id", "property_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the element */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the element data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_access_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the compound */,
  "elements" TEXT /* List of elements in the compound */,
  "properties" TEXT /* Structural properties of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_compounds_elements FOREIGN KEY ("elements") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the research paper */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations received */,
  "elements" TEXT /* List of elements discussed in the paper */,
  "compounds" TEXT /* List of compounds discussed in the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_compounds FOREIGN KEY ("compounds") REFERENCES element_compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_elements FOREIGN KEY ("elements") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_properties" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., melting point, boiling point) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "property_units" TEXT /* Units of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id", "property_name")
)
